title: olearia rugosa subsp. angustifolia
intro: Olearia rugosa subsp. angustifolia, also known as the narrow-leaved tree daisy, is a flowering plant species native to Australia. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine, with reported medicinal properties including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Olearia rugosa subsp. angustifolia are said to include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and skin conditions, due to its potential to soothe and calm the nervous system. Herbal preparations of the plant may be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional and folk medicine practices.
